texto: Hence a certain tension between religion and society marks the higher stages of every civilization. Religion begins by offering magical aid to harassed and bewildered men
autor: it culminates by giving to a people that unity of morals and belief which seems so favorable to statesmanship and art
explicacao: Citação de it culminates by giving to a people that unity of morals and belief which seems so favorable to statesmanship and art sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “Hence a certain tension between religion and society marks the higher stages of every civilizatio…” articula motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
